prompt: I need a new endpoint GET /api/v1/reportes/pagos-export that exports all payments for the authenticated user's organization as a CSV file. It should accept optional query params fecha_inicio and fecha_fin to filter by date range. Return the CSV with proper content-disposition header.

assertions.text: Handler uses Claims or WriteAccess extractor for authentication
Queries filter by organizacion_id from claims (tenant scoping)
Applies a default date range or maximum date range limit to prevent unbounded exports
Sets Content-Disposition: attachment header on the response
Logs the export event with structured tracing fields
Does not expose internal error details in the response body
Caps row count or enforces date boundaries to prevent memory exhaustion
